tasks.title: Clean existing auth-ui package and set up project structure
tasks.description: Remove all existing files from packages/auth-ui/src/, test/, docs/. Set up new directory structure: src/components/, src/hooks/, src/utils/, src/icons/, test/. Update package.json with correct dependencies (@repo/i18n, @repo/schemas as devDep, React 18/19 peer deps, testing deps including vitest-axe). Update tsconfig.json and vitest.config.ts.

tasks.title: Define all TypeScript types in types.ts
tasks.description: Create src/types.ts with all exported interfaces: AuthResult, SignInMethods, SignUpMethods, ForgotPasswordMethod, ResetPasswordMethod, ChangePasswordMethod, VerifyEmailMethod, AuthSession, SessionUser, OAuthProvider, UserMenuItem, PasswordStrengthLevel, PasswordStrengthResult, AuthTheme, and all ClassNames interfaces (SignInFormClassNames, SignUpFormClassNames, ForgotPasswordFormClassNames, ResetPasswordFormClassNames, ChangePasswordFormClassNames, VerifyEmailClassNames, PasswordStrengthIndicatorClassNames, UserButtonClassNames). All component Props interfaces.

tasks.title: Create CSS variables stylesheet with defaults and dark mode
tasks.description: Create src/styles.css with :root CSS variables (--auth-primary, --auth-primary-hover, --auth-error, --auth-success, --auth-text, --auth-text-muted, --auth-bg, --auth-input-border, --auth-input-focus, --auth-radius, --auth-font-family) with default values (cyan-to-emerald theme). Add .dark / prefers-color-scheme: dark overrides. All variables prefixed with --auth- to avoid conflicts.

tasks.title: Implement theming system (theme.ts + AuthThemeProvider)
tasks.description: Create src/theme.ts with AuthTheme type, default theme object, and CSS variable name mapping function. Create src/theme-provider.tsx with AuthThemeProvider React context that accepts AuthTheme and injects CSS variables via inline style on a wrapping div. Export useAuthTheme hook for internal use. The provider is optional -- components fall back to CSS variables or defaults.

tasks.title: Add auth i18n translation keys to @repo/i18n (es/en/pt)
tasks.description: Add 'auth' namespace to @repo/i18n with translation keys for all components: sign-in form (email, password, submit, forgotPassword, signUpLink, oauthDivider, errors), sign-up form (name, email, password, submit, signInLink, errors), forgot-password (title, emailLabel, submit, successTitle, successMessage, backToSignIn), reset-password (title, newPassword, confirmPassword, submit, successTitle, signInLink, errors), change-password (currentPassword, newPassword, confirmPassword, submit, errors), verify-email (verifying, success, error, redirecting), password-strength (levels, rules), user-button (signIn, signOut, menuLabel). All three locales: es (primary), en, pt.

tasks.title: Implement getInitials utility
tasks.description: Create src/utils/initials.ts with getInitials({ name }: { name?: string | null }): string function. Logic: split name by spaces, take first letter of first and last word, uppercase, return max 2 chars. Handle edge cases: null/undefined/empty returns '', single word returns first letter.

tasks.title: Implement getDisplayName utility
tasks.description: Create src/utils/display-name.ts with getDisplayName({ session }: { session?: AuthSession | null }): string function. Fallback chain: session.user.name -> session.user.email -> ''. Handle null/undefined session.

tasks.title: Implement usePasswordStrength hook
tasks.description: Create src/hooks/use-password-strength.ts with usePasswordStrength({ password, minLength }: { password: string; minLength?: number }): PasswordStrengthResult hook. Evaluates 5 rules: minLength (default 8), hasUppercase, hasLowercase, hasNumber, hasSpecialChar. Score = count of passing rules. Level mapping: 0-1=very-weak, 2=weak, 3=fair, 4=strong, 5=very-strong. Memoize result with useMemo.

tasks.title: Implement useAuthTranslations hook
tasks.description: Rewrite src/hooks/use-auth-translations.ts. Import createT or useTranslation from @repo/i18n. Return { t, isI18nAvailable }. When i18n is available, use 'auth' namespace. When not available, fall back to a comprehensive Spanish fallback object covering ALL translation keys defined in T-005. Support parameter interpolation with {param} syntax.

tasks.title: Implement PasswordStrengthIndicator component
tasks.description: Create src/components/password-strength-indicator.tsx. Props: password, minLength?, showRules?, classNames?. Uses usePasswordStrength hook internally. Renders: colored strength bar (5 segments, colored up to current level), text label for current level, optional individual rule checkboxes. Colors: very-weak=red, weak=orange, fair=yellow, strong=green, very-strong=emerald. Uses CSS variables for theming. aria-valuenow and aria-valuetext for accessibility.

tasks.title: Implement OAuthButtons internal component and built-in icons
tasks.description: Create src/icons/google.tsx, src/icons/facebook.tsx, src/icons/github.tsx as simple SVG icon components. Create src/components/oauth-buttons.tsx (internal, not exported from index). Props: providers, onOAuthSignIn, callbackURL, classNames?, isLoading?. Renders a button per provider with icon + name. If provider.icon is provided, use it; otherwise fall back to built-in icon matching provider.id. Show individual loading state per button.

tasks.title: Implement SignInForm component
tasks.description: Create src/components/sign-in-form.tsx. Props: onSignIn, onOAuthSignIn?, providers?, redirectTo?, signUpUrl?, forgotPasswordUrl?, onSuccess?, classNames?. Form with email + password fields. Submit calls onSignIn({ email, password }). Loading state on button. Error display with role='alert'. Optional OAuthButtons above/below form with divider. Links to sign up and forgot password if URLs provided. Hydration-safe (useEffect mount guard). All text via useAuthTranslations. classNames applied per slot. Uses CSS variables for styling.

tasks.title: Implement SignUpForm component
tasks.description: Create src/components/sign-up-form.tsx. Props: onSignUp, onOAuthSignIn?, providers?, redirectTo?, signInUrl?, onSuccess?, classNames?. Form with name + email + password fields. Client-side validation: required fields, password min 8 chars. Submit calls onSignUp({ name, email, password }). Loading/error/success states. OAuthButtons integration. Hydration-safe. i18n via useAuthTranslations. classNames per slot.

tasks.title: Implement ForgotPasswordForm component
tasks.description: Create src/components/forgot-password-form.tsx. Props: onForgotPassword, redirectTo?, signInUrl?, classNames?. Two states: form (email input + submit) and success ('check your email' message + back to sign-in link). Submit calls onForgotPassword({ email, redirectTo }). Loading/error states. All text via i18n (fix current hardcoded English). classNames per slot.

tasks.title: Implement ResetPasswordForm component
tasks.description: Create src/components/reset-password-form.tsx. Props: token, onResetPassword, signInUrl?, onSuccess?, minPasswordLength?, classNames?. Form with new password + confirm password + PasswordStrengthIndicator. Client-side validation: min length, passwords match. Submit calls onResetPassword({ newPassword, token }). Success state with sign-in link. Token error handling with 'request new link' message. i18n + classNames.

tasks.title: Implement ChangePasswordForm component
tasks.description: Create src/components/change-password-form.tsx. Props: onChangePassword, requireCurrentPassword? (default true), minPasswordLength? (default 8), minStrengthLevel? (default 'fair'), onSuccess?, classNames?. Form with optional current password + new password + confirm password + PasswordStrengthIndicator. Prevent submit if strength < minStrengthLevel. Submit calls onChangePassword({ currentPassword?, newPassword }). Error/success states. i18n + classNames.

tasks.title: Implement VerifyEmail component
tasks.description: Create src/components/verify-email.tsx. Props: token, onVerifyEmail, redirectTo?, redirectDelay? (default 3000), onSuccess?, classNames?. Auto-calls onVerifyEmail({ token }) on mount via useEffect. Three states: loading (spinner + 'Verifying...'), success (checkmark + message + auto-redirect countdown), error (X icon + message + retry suggestion). i18n + classNames.

tasks.title: Implement UserButton component
tasks.description: Create src/components/user-button.tsx. Props: session?, isPending?, onSignOut, signInUrl?, menuItems?, classNames?. When session is null: render sign-in link/button. When session exists: render avatar (image or initials via getInitials) + click to open dropdown. Dropdown shows user name/email, menu items as links with optional icons, sign-out button at bottom. Close on Escape, click outside. Keyboard accessible. Loading skeleton when isPending. i18n + classNames.

tasks.title: Set up index.ts exports
tasks.description: Create src/index.ts exporting all public API: all components (SignInForm, SignUpForm, ForgotPasswordForm, ResetPasswordForm, ChangePasswordForm, VerifyEmail, PasswordStrengthIndicator, UserButton), AuthThemeProvider, useAuthTranslations, usePasswordStrength, getInitials, getDisplayName, and all types from types.ts. Do NOT export internal components (OAuthButtons, icons).

tasks.title: Set up test infrastructure (vitest config, test utils, axe setup)
tasks.description: Create test/setup.tsx with testing-library/jest-dom matchers, jsdom environment, vitest-axe setup. Create test/test-utils.tsx with custom render wrapper, mock useAuthTranslations, mock auth methods factories. Verify vitest.config.ts has coverage thresholds set to 90%.

tasks.title: Tests for getInitials and getDisplayName utilities
tasks.description: Create test/utils.test.ts. Test getInitials: two-word name returns 2 initials, single word returns 1, empty/null returns '', trims whitespace, handles multiple spaces. Test getDisplayName: name present returns name, no name returns email, null session returns ''.

tasks.title: Tests for usePasswordStrength hook
tasks.description: Create test/use-password-strength.test.ts using renderHook. Test: empty password = very-weak, only lowercase = very-weak, lowercase+uppercase = weak, +number = fair, +special = strong, all rules + long = very-strong. Test custom minLength. Test memoization (same input = same reference).

tasks.title: Tests for useAuthTranslations hook
tasks.description: Create test/use-auth-translations.test.ts. Test: returns t function, fallback to Spanish when i18n not configured, parameter interpolation works ({name} replaced), isI18nAvailable flag correct. Mock @repo/i18n for both available and unavailable scenarios.

tasks.title: Tests for PasswordStrengthIndicator component
tasks.description: Create test/password-strength-indicator.test.tsx. Test: renders strength bar, updates level on password change, shows rule checkboxes when showRules=true, hides rules when showRules=false, applies classNames, aria-valuenow/aria-valuetext present, axe a11y scan passes.

tasks.title: Tests for SignInForm component
tasks.description: Create test/sign-in-form.test.tsx. Test: renders email/password fields, submit calls onSignIn, loading state disables button and shows spinner, error displayed with role='alert', OAuth buttons shown when providers given, no OAuth when no providers, classNames applied, hydration-safe, signUpUrl/forgotPasswordUrl links rendered, axe a11y scan passes.

tasks.title: Tests for SignUpForm component
tasks.description: Create test/sign-up-form.test.tsx. Test: renders name/email/password fields, submit calls onSignUp, password < 8 chars shows validation error, OAuth integration, error handling for USER_ALREADY_EXISTS, loading state, classNames, axe a11y scan passes.

tasks.title: Tests for ForgotPasswordForm component
tasks.description: Create test/forgot-password-form.test.tsx. Test: renders email field, submit calls onForgotPassword, success state shows 'check your email' message, back-to-signin link shown, empty email validation, error handling, classNames, axe a11y scan passes.

tasks.title: Tests for ResetPasswordForm component
tasks.description: Create test/reset-password-form.test.tsx. Test: renders password + confirm fields, PasswordStrengthIndicator visible, password mismatch error, short password error, submit calls onResetPassword with token, success state with sign-in link, token expired error handling, classNames, axe a11y scan passes.

tasks.title: Tests for ChangePasswordForm component
tasks.description: Create test/change-password-form.test.tsx. Test: renders current + new + confirm fields when requireCurrentPassword=true, hides current when false, PasswordStrengthIndicator present, prevents submit when strength < minStrengthLevel, password mismatch error, submit calls onChangePassword, error/success states, classNames, axe a11y scan passes.

tasks.title: Tests for VerifyEmail component
tasks.description: Create test/verify-email.test.tsx. Test: auto-calls onVerifyEmail on mount, loading state shown initially, success state with checkmark and redirect countdown, error state with message, no redirect on error, custom redirectDelay, onSuccess callback, classNames, axe a11y scan passes.

tasks.title: Tests for UserButton component
tasks.description: Create test/user-button.test.tsx. Test: shows sign-in link when no session, shows avatar when session exists, dropdown opens on click, menuItems rendered with labels/icons/hrefs, sign-out button calls onSignOut, dropdown closes on Escape, dropdown closes on click outside, initials fallback when no image, isPending shows skeleton, classNames applied, axe a11y scan passes.

tasks.title: Tests for AuthThemeProvider
tasks.description: Create test/theme-provider.test.tsx. Test: injects CSS variables as inline styles, default theme applied when no props, partial theme merges with defaults, nested providers work (inner overrides outer), components without provider use CSS variable defaults.

tasks.title: Verify 90%+ test coverage
tasks.description: Run vitest with coverage. Verify all files have >= 90% line and branch coverage. Add missing tests for any uncovered branches/lines. Fix any failing tests.

tasks.title: Update apps/web-old auth component imports
tasks.description: Update imports in apps/web-old/src/components/auth/ to use new @repo/auth-ui exports. Ensure SignIn.client.tsx, SignUp.client.tsx, ForgotPassword.client.tsx, ResetPassword.client.tsx, VerifyEmail.client.tsx all import from @repo/auth-ui correctly. Adapt prop names if any changed. Verify the web-old app builds successfully with pnpm build.

tasks.title: Update apps/admin auth component imports
tasks.description: Update imports in apps/admin/src/routes/auth/ and apps/admin/src/integrations/clerk/header-user.tsx to use new @repo/auth-ui exports where applicable. The admin has its own full sign-in/sign-up pages with twin-panel layout -- these may use SignInForm/SignUpForm internally or stay as-is (admin-specific layout). At minimum verify imports compile. Verify admin app builds successfully.

tasks.title: Write CLAUDE.md for the package
tasks.description: Create packages/auth-ui/CLAUDE.md documenting: package purpose (pure React auth UI components), architecture (prop-based injection, no auth client dependency), component list with brief descriptions, theming approach (CSS variables + classNames + AuthThemeProvider), i18n setup, testing commands, key patterns (hydration safety, named exports, RO-RO), out of scope (no AuthProvider/Context/session management).

tasks.title: Final build verification and smoke test
tasks.description: Run pnpm build from monorepo root to verify all packages and apps build. Run pnpm typecheck to verify no type errors. Run pnpm lint to verify no lint errors. Run pnpm test in packages/auth-ui to verify all tests pass with 90%+ coverage. Document any migration notes for consuming apps.
